title: Claude Opus 4.6
summary: Claude just went full beast mode with a 1M token context window (beta), 128K output tokens, and agentic capabilities that actually work. Literally shipped Agent Teams and adaptive thinking without making you pay extra.
takeaway: 1M context window + 128K output at standard pricing

title: Viktor by Zeta Labs
summary: This Slack agent actually observes how your team works and chimes in with automation ideas you didn't even think of. Built from the Claude Code team, it's lowkey the future of workflow automation—no more context switching.
takeaway: AI agent that lives in Slack and proactively suggests automations

title: Windsurf (IDE)
summary: Windsurf added Arena Mode so you can pit Claude vs GPT vs other models against each other on your code. Plan Mode now handles smarter task planning before generation. It's like having a team of devs fighting over whose solution is best.
takeaway: Arena Mode lets models compete side-by-side for your coding
